All right, way in day step three, food and pictures. So we are going to be talking about food and then getting their final pictures. So one line of food question, this is the setup that will start the conversation about food and it'll walk you through that entire conversation. So that goes something like, were you planning on buying and prepping all of this food yourself or did you want some help with it? Right, so they have a food list and they might have some ideas on what they want to do. You can totally over deliver and give them some ideas, but typically there's going to be a meal that they struggle with or that they've already told you is like their biggest challenge. So then you ask them that question. So what meal do you struggle with the most? Right, and they might say like breakfast, lunch, dinner, but somebody will always say one of the meals. So then you follow up with awesome. So what most people do is they replace the meals that they struggle with the most. It saves them a lot of time and money and then you only need to think about like lunch and dinner. So if somebody says they struggle with breakfast, I never eat breakfast. I haven't eaten breakfast in years. You can say awesome. So what we'll do for breakfast is we'll replace that one. So we only need to focus on the other two and it's going to save you a lot of money too. So basically you say, does that sound good? You want to do that? Plus there is some killer shakes that you can make with the other ingredients and your food list as well. So if they're like, yeah, I love shakes or that sounds awesome, I'll just blend it up. Be like perfect, awesome. I will set you up with our vanilla shakes. So that is going to be the meal replacement for whatever is their most problematic meal. And you can totally over deliver and give them like suggestions on shakes that you like or that things they can mix in with their ingredient list or their food list with the vanilla, that would be awesome. So and the reason that we are setting the vanilla shakes separate from the supplement sale is because this is food. It is a replacement for food. It's not a supplement. When you flip over the label, you see nutritional facts. When you flip over your supplement labels, you see supplement facts. So this truly is a food and they will be replacing a food with another food, right? So, and again, it's a third buying wallet. So they'll have a buying wallet for services. Then they'll have one for supplementations. And then they'll always have one for food. And this is just part of that food budget that they have, right? So they're just getting it from you. So that is why we want to set them up with our vanilla shakes. It helps with their most problematic meal. It makes their life easier. They'll get better results and they'll save money in the process. So then what we wanna do is we wanna take the picture at the end. And the reason that we do this is because in case any of these other processes took longer, they can always just send you a picture themselves of their front, you know, backside. And you'll probably get a better picture because they will be a little bit more revealing, which is awesome for testimonials. They might not feel as comfortable like at the gym or in front of you or whatever it may be as they would in the comforts of their own home. So if you don't have time or you don't want to take the picture at the gym, that's why we save it to the end. If you do end up taking the picture, I recommend that you use the Voxer app and you can just use your own phone and open up the Voxer thread that you have with them and snap the picture. So they have a copy of it right off the bat as well. So you're sending them a picture of themselves. And then when you enter that in on your tracking sheet, you're just grabbing the URL from that picture, which we show you how to do. And it is on the cloud and you guys both will always have access to their first before picture, right? So that is the final step and make sure that the appointment is already set in the calendar booked for the next time they're coming in to see you, which is two weeks later. That way it really provides value and shows how important these bi-weekly check-ins because you schedule it two weeks in advance, right? So that's the final part of Way in Day. Now you can go on and crush with the rest of fulfillment.
